body: Cargo loaded at KA. 22 units. Move at 9. Adjoa and Nii behind you.
Ready. Leaving now.
Done. 1/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
22 units ready. Kofi confirmed. Adjoa and Nii at the bay. Move now.
Copy. On my way to KA.
Done. 2/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
Cargo loaded. Same as before — 22 units. No changes tonight.
Understood. Leaving in 10.
Police moving north on the road. Stay put at Sogakope. Do not cross.
Understood. Parked at Shell. Waiting.
Done. 3/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
KA confirmed. 22 units. Nii says police light near the checkpoint. Go slow.
OK. Going slow past the checkpoint.
Checkpoint is clear. Proceed.
Done. 4/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
22 units. Manifest is fabric. You know the drill. Move at 9.
Ready. Moving at 9.
Done. 5/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
All clear. 22 units loaded. Adjoa will lead past the checkpoint.
Understood. Moving now.
Past Sogakope. 45 minutes to the gate.
Done. 6/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
7 confirmed. 22 units at KA. Kofi is waiting. Do not be late.
On my way. 15 minutes.
Done. 7/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
28 units tonight. Heavier. Drive slow especially after Sogakope. Call me at the gate.
OK. Will drive slow. 28 is heavy.
Heavy load but moving fine. At Sogakope now.
Good. Do not rush. Gate contact is waiting.
Done. 8/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
22 units. Normal run. Adjoa and Nii confirmed. Move when ready.
Ready. Heading to KA now.
Done. 9/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
10th run. 22 units. KA loaded. Adjoa says road is clear tonight.
OK. 10th run. Let us go.
Gate contact confirmed. ETA?
1 hour. All good.
Done. 10/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
Last run. 28 units. Heaviest load. Take your time. Christmas after this.
Understood. Moving at 9. Adjoa and Nii confirmed.
Done. 11/11. On the way back.
Good. Drive safe. Call when home.
Adjoa are you at KA?
Yes. Waiting for you. Nii is here too.
Adjoa I am 5 minutes. Heavy load tonight.
OK. Nii is ready. We will stay close on the road.
Kwame how is the van? Any problems with it?
Van is fine. Going to Makola tomorrow to pick some fabric.
Kwame my name is on the van. Make sure you are careful with it.
Auntie don't worry. Everything is fine. I am careful.
Last run. After this we stop for 2 weeks. Christmas cover.
Understood. Moving at 9. Adjoa and Nii confirmed.
Police stopped me at Aflao. They have the van. Delete everything.
Say nothing. You were transporting fabric. You know nothing.
What about Adjoa and Nii?
They are gone already. You are on your own. Remember — fabric.
Mr Asare. Your vehicle IVI will be examined under NACOC warrant NACOC/2024/0312. Cooperate fully.
